responses.Fix priority order: Start with Dashboard (highest impact), then NotificationManager, DataTable, AnalyticsService
responses.Testing approach: Combination: Unit tests for cleanup, integration tests for full flow, Chrome DevTools for profiling
responses.Leak detection library: Use React DevTools Profiler + manual heap snapshots (no third-party needed)
responses.Refactor vs patch: Minimal refactoring - focus on adding proper cleanup functions
responses.Singleton implementation: Use module-level instance with lazy initialization
responses.Cache strategy: LRU cache with size limit (use Map with size tracking)
responses.Documentation format: Markdown guide with screenshots and code examples
responses.Test framework: React Testing Library + Jest (already in project)
